candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT definition.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to a clean total line.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported current-assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Restricted cash is usually excluded from CHE unless explicitly included in cash equivalents.
Could represent cash, but the cleaner explicit line Cash and Cash Equivalents exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents End Period
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending cash can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet label is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet cash line rather than cash-flow period-end cash.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
Component only, not total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Accrued expenses and other current liabilities
candidates.why: Component/subtotal only, not full LCT.
Debt component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Semantically appropriate for current portion of long-term debt, but appears blank in preview.
Semantically appropriate current maturities of long-term debt; candidate line available.
Cleaner IFRS current debt total; likely already captures current borrowings/current maturities and excludes lease liabilities because lease liabilities are shown separately.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is a cleaner reported short-term debt total. Avoided adding Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year to prevent double counting, since values overlap in some years and lease liabilities are separately disclosed.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet taxes payable/current tax liability line; best match for TXP.
Cash-flow line is not preferred when a balance-sheet taxes payable line exists.
Change line is not the stock variable TXP.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet stock variable rather than cash-flow tax movement lines.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet PPE line; best match for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Medical devices
candidates.why: Component/gross item, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Cash-flow investing line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the reported PPE balance-sheet line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement; directly matches OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Direct match; duplicate appearances exist, but the same exact row label is the correct mapping.
